rationale: Educ. Code §48.0052 governs ADA adjustments for reading intervention days. It does not reference homestead exemption amounts or property tax appraised values, so no direct conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 48.0052. INCENTIVE FOR ADDITIONAL INSTRUCTIONAL DAYS FOR READING INTERVENTIONS.
_note: No direct textual or operational conflict between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this statute, which addresses attendance-based funding incentives unrelated to property tax exemption levels.
